zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Bromwich於大約1330年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾時，她的父親Lord Henry de Bromwich26歲，母親Madam Bromwich24歲。她於1367年與John de la Roche在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾蕾托 布洛維其結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1383年在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾帕可哈爾享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Bromwich于大约1330年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾时，她的父亲Lord Henry de Bromwich26岁，母亲Madam Bromwich24岁。她于1367年与John de la Roche在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾蕾托 布洛維其结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1383年在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾帕可哈爾享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bromwich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from West Bromwich (Staffs) or Castle and Little Bromwich (Warwicks).

variants.name: Bromage
meanings: English (Warwickshire and Worcestershire): habitational name from West Bromwich in Staffordshire, or Castle and Little Bromwich in Warwickshire, named in Old English with brōm ‘broom’ (the shrub) + wīc ‘outlying dairy farm’. Compare Brumage .

variants.name: Brimage
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Brumage  . This name is comparatively rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Bromwich was born about 1330, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Lord Henry de Bromwich, was 26 and her mother, Madam Bromwich, was 24. She married John de la Roche in 1367, in Little Bromwich, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1383, in Parkhall, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Bromwich est née environ 1330, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord Henry de Bromwich, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Madam Bromwich, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé John de la Roche en 1367, à Little Bromwich, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1383, à Parkhall, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Bromwichが約1330年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで生まれた時，父Lord Henry de Bromwichは26歳，母Madam Bromwichは24歳であった。1367年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアリットル ブロムウィチでJohn de la Rocheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1383年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアパークハルで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Bromwich(이)가 대략 1330년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord Henry de Bromwich(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Madam Bromwich(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1367년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 리틀 브롬위치에서 John de la Roche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1383년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 박홀에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Bromwich родилась около 1330 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Lord Henry de Bromwich было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Madam Bromwich, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de la Roche в 1367 г. в местности литл бромвич, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1383 г. в местности пархолл, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет.
